step1.title: Choose a verse or topic
step1.desc: Enter any Bible reference like "John 3:16" or ask a spiritual question like "What does the Bible say about anxiety?" — Disciplefy understands both and gets you started instantly.
step1.imageAlt: Disciplefy app — Bible verse search screen, type John 3:16 or a spiritual question to begin

step2.title: Get an instant AI guide
step2.desc: Our AI generates a complete study guide in seconds — a clear summary, historical and cultural context, verse-by-verse interpretation, practical life application, and related scripture references, all grounded in sound theology.
step2.imageAlt: AI-generated Bible study guide showing historical context, verse-by-verse interpretation and life application

step3.title: Talk to your AI Voice Discipler
step3.desc: Have a real voice conversation about any Bible passage or spiritual question. Your AI Voice Discipler listens, responds naturally in your language, and walks you through Scripture like a personal Bible study companion — anytime, anywhere.
step3.imageAlt: Voice Discipler conversation screen — speak your Bible question and hear a response in your language

step4.title: Follow a learning path
step4.desc: Go deeper with structured discipleship journeys on Grace, Prayer, Faith, and more. Each path walks you through a curated sequence of lessons — so you're not just studying random verses, you're growing with purpose and direction.
step4.imageAlt: Discipleship learning path screen showing structured journeys on Grace, Prayer and Faith

step5.title: Memorize & grow
step5.desc: Build lasting habits with daily verse reminders, spaced-repetition memorization practice with audio and fill-in-the-blank modes, streak tracking to stay consistent, and a growing library of your saved study guides.
step5.imageAlt: Daily verse reminder and memorization practice screen with streak tracking and saved study guides

faqs.a: Tokens are the currency for AI features in Disciplefy. Each study guide, follow-up, or AI Discipler call uses a small number of tokens. Your plan resets your token count daily.
Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
Payments are processed securely via Razorpay. We accept UPI, debit/credit cards, and net banking.
Yes. We use Supabase Auth and follow India's DPDP 2023 guidelines. We never sell your data.
English, Hindi, and Malayalam. All AI features including study guides and Voice Buddy work in all three languages.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: We believe every believer deserves to understand God's Word in their heart language. Disciplefy exists to make deep, meaningful Bible study accessible to every Indian Christian — in English, Hindi, and Malayalam.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To enable every Indian Christian to study Scripture deeply, daily, in the language they think and pray in. We envision a generation of believers who are rooted in God's Word and equipped to live it out in their communities.

theology.title: Theological Stance
theology.p1: Disciplefy is built on orthodox Protestant Christian theology. All content is reviewed for doctrinal accuracy and follows historical-grammatical interpretation of Scripture. We hold to the foundational truths of the Christian faith as expressed in historic creeds.
theology.p2: We do not replace the local church or its leadership. Disciplefy is a tool to complement your church community, Sunday school, and personal devotional life — not to substitute them.

technology.title: The Technology
technology.content: Disciplefy uses AI to generate Bible study content — summaries, context, interpretation, prayer points, and discussion questions. The AI follows strict theological guidelines and all output is constrained to align with orthodox Christian teaching. The AI assists study; it does not interpret Scripture with authority. That authority belongs to Scripture alone.
